packageRules.description: Batch every non-major update (npm, docker, github-actions) into a single PR so we never see more than one routine dependency PR at a time.

Do NOT bump actions/setup-node to v7 — v7 changed how registry-url writes .npmrc and breaks OIDC Trusted Publishing (ENEEDAUTH). Pinned to v6.x. See .github/workflows/sdk-publish.yml and actions/setup-node#1551.

vulnerabilityAlerts.description: Security fixes are not held for the fortnightly window.
